reader_brief.next_action: Keep B5/B6/v3 blocked unless B4 evidence is no longer inconclusive.
reader_brief.summary: B4 remains inconclusive mainly because current evidence is too narrow.
reader_brief.warnings: Diagnosis only; does not continue B5/B6/v3 or change strategy logic.

recommended_interpretation: Run more B4 windows before B5; if B3 remains weak or B2 remains inactive, return to B2/B3 design instead of confidence shrinkage.

root_cause_taxonomy.evidence: B2 E0 matched same-window B0R; risk scaler did not create observable benefit.
B3 E0 underperformed B0R on return and drawdown in the mini window.
No conflict observed; B4 E0 effectively matched B3 E0 because B2 exposure stayed full.
Only one short mini window is available for B2/B3/B4 interaction evidence.

Only return/drawdown/turnover partial utility is available; frozen scorecard components for tracking error, worst-window, dispersion, cost drag, stress and signal robustness penalties are not complete.
B4 increased turnover/cost proxy while reducing return versus B0R.
Stress result is not available in the current mini-backfill.
External benchmark-relative gate is not available; only B0R proxy is available.
B2 and B3 signal diagnostics passed; issue is evidence breadth, not BLOCKED signal.
Formula is deterministic, but B2 threshold activation was not observed in this window.
